title: Minty Mango Paneer Salad
description: A refreshing salad with the sweetness of mango, the coolness of mint, and the creaminess of paneer. Perfect for a light and healthy snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice and salt.
Add the chopped mint leaves and mix well.
Add the cubed paneer and mix gently.
Add the diced mango and mix carefully to avoid mashing the fruit.
Add the finely chopped green chili and mix well.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled and garnish with additional mint leaves if desired.
